name: Monmouthshire (United Kingdom)
description: Party per pale blue and black, with three gold fleurs-de-lis arranged two and one.
history: Recognised by the Flag Institute as the flag of the historic county of Monmouthshire. The design is a banner of the historic arms — per pale azure and sable, three fleurs-de-lis or.

features.role: field party per pale — blue at the hoist, black at the fly

features.symbolism: from the historic arms of Monmouthshire
